name: TeleKash Prediction Oracle
description: Probability oracle + trade broker for the agent economy. 26 tools across 500+ live prediction markets from Kalshi (CFTC-regulated) and Polymarket. Multi-source resolution oracle with cross-source verification (0.70-0.99 confidence). Smart trade routing with 1% commission OR dual-sided native pools (trade alongside Telegram users). Structured TPF signals, cross-source arbitrage detection, noise filtering, Kelly Criterion sizing, agent performance tracking with Brier scores, and webhook alerts.

skills.name: Prediction Market Intelligence
skills.description: Real-time probabilities, sentiment, confidence scores, and historical trends across 500+ markets from 3 sources (Kalshi, Polymarket, Metaculus).
examples: What are the odds Trump wins 2028?
Show me crypto prediction markets
What's trending in politics predictions?

skills.name: Cross-Source Arbitrage & Divergence Detection
skills.description: Detects pricing discrepancies between Kalshi, Polymarket, and Metaculus. Finds where sources disagree most — that's where alpha lives. $40M+ extracted from prediction market mispricings annually.
examples: Find arbitrage opportunities across prediction markets
Where do Kalshi and Polymarket disagree most?
Show me markets with strong consensus divergence

skills.name: TeleKash Probability Format (TPF) Signals
skills.description: Structured pre-computed trading signals combining probability, confidence, sentiment, noise filter, and cross-source data into one actionable verdict (STRONG_BUY to STRONG_SELL).
examples: Give me a trading signal for Bitcoin prediction markets
Should I buy YES on the Fed rate cut market?
What's the signal quality on this market — signal or noise?

skills.name: Kelly Criterion Capital Efficiency
skills.description: Optimal position sizing using Kelly Criterion. Computes edge, optimal bankroll allocation, expected value, and risk classification for prediction market positions.
examples: How much of my $1000 bankroll should I allocate to this market?
What's my edge vs the market on Bitcoin predictions?
Find the best risk/reward opportunities for my portfolio

skills.name: Agent Prediction Performance
skills.description: Track prediction accuracy with Brier scores, calibration curves, and edge-vs-market analysis. Build a verifiable prediction track record.
examples: Track my prediction: YES on Bitcoin >100k at 75%
How accurate are my predictions?
What's my Brier score?

skills.name: Event-Driven Webhook Alerts
skills.description: Register alerts for market events. Agent sleeps until TeleKash wakes it up. Conditions: probability crosses, mispricing detected, volume spike, resolution, divergence.
examples: Alert me when Bitcoin YES crosses 70%
Notify me when any Kalshi/Polymarket gap exceeds 5%
Tell me when this market resolves

skills.name: Jurisdictional Compliance Filtering
skills.description: Filter markets by regulatory jurisdiction. US-regulated (Kalshi, CFTC), international (Polymarket), or forecasting (Metaculus, immune to gambling regulation).
examples: Show me only CFTC-regulated prediction markets
List international markets only
What forecasting markets are available?

skills.name: Custom Market Creation
skills.description: Create agent-powered prediction markets. Binary YES/NO questions that resolve on a specified date. Other agents can query, predict on, and trade these markets.
examples: Create a market: Will ETH flip BTC by 2027?
Set up a prediction market for the next election

skills.name: Smart Trade Routing Broker
skills.description: Execute trades on prediction markets through TeleKash. Smart router picks the best exchange (Kalshi or Polymarket) based on market source and price. Supports market and limit orders. 1% commission. Full order lifecycle: place, check status, cancel.
examples: Buy $100 of YES on the Bitcoin $200K market
Place a limit order at 0.45 for NO on the election market
Check my order status
Cancel my pending order

skills.name: Dual-Sided Liquidity Pools
skills.description: Trade in native TeleKash parimutuel pools alongside Telegram users. Your USD converts to Stars-equivalent, joining the SAME pool as human traders. More participants = deeper liquidity = better odds. 5% pool fee at resolution.
examples: Join the Bitcoin pool with $50 on YES
Check pool status for the election market
What's my agent balance?
Route my trade to the native pool instead of Polymarket
